\tzpentry{ID5627}{Tunnel Quantum Hamiltonian Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5627 introduces Tunnel Quantum Hamiltonian Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
\(H_{\text{tunnel}} = -\hbar^2/(2m_{\text{eff}}) \nabla^2 + V_{\text{barrier}}(r,\theta,\phi,t)\)
\]
